attributes.description: Kubernetes overview with resource counts. Start here to navigate your Kubernetes resources.

embeddableConfig.description: Navigation links to other K8s dashboards.

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS fs_usage = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS disk_used = SUM(fs_usage)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC, disk_used DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY time_bucket

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS fs_usage = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS disk_used = SUM(fs_usage)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC, disk_used DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY time_bucket

embeddableConfig.description: Total disk space utilization use over time for the 10 clusters with the highest usage in each time interval.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 clusters by disk utilization

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    mem_ws    = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc_mem = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL mem_pct = CASE(alloc_mem > 0, TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), NULL)
| STATS mem_util = AVG(mem_pct)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC, mem_util DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY time_bucket

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    mem_ws    = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc_mem = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL mem_pct = CASE(alloc_mem > 0, TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), NULL)
| STATS mem_util = AVG(mem_pct)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC, mem_util DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY time_bucket

embeddableConfig.description: Average memory utilization over time for the 10 clusters with the highest usage in each time interval.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 clusters by memory working set utilization

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc_cpu = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL cpu_pct = CASE(alloc_cpu > 0, cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, NULL)
| STATS cpu_util = AVG(cpu_pct)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC, cpu_util DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY time_bucket

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc_cpu = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL cpu_pct = CASE(alloc_cpu > 0, cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, NULL)
| STATS cpu_util = AVG(cpu_pct)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC, cpu_util DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY time_bucket

embeddableConfig.description: Average CPU utilization over time for the 10 clusters with the highest usage in each time interval.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 clusters by CPU utlization

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND @timestamp > ?_tend - 5 minutes
| STATS
    total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
    ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready == 1
  BY k8s.cluster.name
| STATS unhealthy_count = COUNT(*) WHERE ready_nodes < total_nodes AND total_nodes > 0

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND @timestamp > ?_tend - 5 minutes
| STATS
    total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
    ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready == 1
  BY k8s.cluster.name
| STATS unhealthy_count = COUNT(*) WHERE ready_nodes < total_nodes AND total_nodes > 0

embeddableConfig.description: Clusters with at least one not-ready node. Uses k8s.node.condition_ready to classify health.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
    ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready == 1
  BY k8s.cluster.name
| STATS healthy_count = COUNT(*) WHERE ready_nodes == total_nodes AND total_nodes > 0

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
    ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready == 1
  BY k8s.cluster.name
| STATS healthy_count = COUNT(*) WHERE ready_nodes == total_nodes AND total_nodes > 0

embeddableConfig.description: Number of clusters where all nodes are ready, based on the latest collected data.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
| STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name
| STATS count = COUNT(*)
| EVAL total_clusters = CASE(count > 0, TO_STRING(count), "No data")

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
| STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name
| STATS count = COUNT(*)
| EVAL total_clusters = CASE(count > 0, TO_STRING(count), "No data")

embeddableConfig.description: Total number of clusters being monitored, based on the latest collected data.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
    ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
  BY k8s.cluster.name
| EVAL health = CASE(ready_nodes == total_nodes, "Healthy", "Unhealthy")
| STATS cluster_count = COUNT(*) BY health
| SORT health ASC

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
    ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
  BY k8s.cluster.name
| EVAL health = CASE(ready_nodes == total_nodes, "Healthy", "Unhealthy")
| STATS cluster_count = COUNT(*) BY health
| SORT health ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Number of clusters in each health state (Healthy or Unhealthy), based on the latest collected data.
embeddableConfig.title: Cluster breakdown by health

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    fs_usage = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    fs_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
    @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL disk_util = CASE(fs_cap > 0, TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), NULL)
| WHERE disk_util IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, @timestamp, disk_util
| SORT @timestamp ASC, disk_util DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    fs_usage = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    fs_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
    @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL disk_util = CASE(fs_cap > 0, TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), NULL)
| WHERE disk_util IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, @timestamp, disk_util
| SORT @timestamp ASC, disk_util DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp

embeddableConfig.description: Average disk utilization over time for the 10 nodes with the highest usage in each time interval.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 nodes by disk utilization

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    mem_ws = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc_mem = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
    timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL mem_util = CASE(alloc_mem > 0, mem_ws / alloc_mem, NULL)
| WHERE mem_util IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, timestamp, mem_util
| SORT timestamp ASC, mem_util DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    mem_ws = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc_mem = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
    timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL mem_util = CASE(alloc_mem > 0, mem_ws / alloc_mem, NULL)
| WHERE mem_util IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, timestamp, mem_util
| SORT timestamp ASC, mem_util DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp

embeddableConfig.description: Average memory utilization over time for the 10 nodes with the highest usage in each time interval.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 nodes by memory working set utilization

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS ready = LAST(k8s.node.condition_ready, @timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| STATS not_ready_nodes = COUNT(*) WHERE ready != 1

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS ready = LAST(k8s.node.condition_ready, @timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| STATS not_ready_nodes = COUNT(*) WHERE ready != 1

embeddableConfig.description: Number of nodes that are not in a ready state across all clusters, based on the latest collected data.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS ready = LAST(k8s.node.condition_ready, @timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| STATS ready_nodes = COUNT(*) WHERE ready == 1

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS ready = LAST(k8s.node.condition_ready, @timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| STATS ready_nodes = COUNT(*) WHERE ready == 1

embeddableConfig.description: Number of nodes in a ready state across all clusters, based on the latest collected data.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| STATS total_nodes = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| STATS total_nodes = COUNT(*)

embeddableConfig.description: Total number of nodes across all clusters, based on the latest collected data.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
  AND @timestamp > ?_tend - 5 minutes
| STATS ready = LAST(k8s.node.condition_ready, @timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| EVAL readiness = CASE(
    ready == 1, "Ready",
    ready == 0, "Not Ready",
    ready == -1, "Unknown",
    "Unknown"
  )
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY readiness
| SORT readiness

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
  AND @timestamp > ?_tend - 5 minutes
| STATS ready = LAST(k8s.node.condition_ready, @timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| EVAL readiness = CASE(
    ready == 1, "Ready",
    ready == 0, "Not Ready",
    ready == -1, "Unknown",
    "Unknown"
  )
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY readiness
| SORT readiness

embeddableConfig.description: Breakdown of nodes by readiness state, based on the latest collected data.
embeddableConfig.title: Node breakdown by readiness

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name
| STATS ns_count = COUNT(*)
| KEEP ns_count

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name
| STATS ns_count = COUNT(*)
| KEEP ns_count

embeddableConfig.description:
Number of unique namespace instances across all clusters, based on the latest collected data. 

Each namespace is counted once per cluster (for example, default on two clusters counts as two).

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key = CONCAT(k8s.cluster.name, ":", k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS
    total_pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(key),
    running_pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name,
    @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL non_running_pods = total_pods - running_pods
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, non_running_pods
| SORT @timestamp ASC, non_running_pods DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key = CONCAT(k8s.cluster.name, ":", k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS
    total_pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(key),
    running_pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name,
    @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL non_running_pods = total_pods - running_pods
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, non_running_pods
| SORT @timestamp ASC, non_running_pods DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp

embeddableConfig.description:
Count of pods not in Running phase per namespace.

Non-running pods may indicate scheduling issues or resource constraints.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 namespaces by non-running pods

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.status.last_terminated_reason == "OOMKilled"
| STATS oom_containers = COUNT_DISTINCT(CONCAT(k8s.pod.uid, "/", k8s.container.name))
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT @timestamp ASC, oom_containers DESC, k8s.namespace.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.status.last_terminated_reason == "OOMKilled"
| STATS oom_containers = COUNT_DISTINCT(CONCAT(k8s.pod.uid, "/", k8s.container.name))
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT @timestamp ASC, oom_containers DESC, k8s.namespace.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp

embeddableConfig.description: Shows the top 10 namespaces per time bucket by count of distinct containers whose last termination reason is OOMKilled (kernel OOM killer),
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 namespaces by OOM events

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name != ""
  AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
| STATS restarts_per_container = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name,
    @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS restarts = SUM(restarts_per_container)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, restarts
| SORT @timestamp ASC, restarts DESC, k8s.namespace.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name != ""
  AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
| STATS restarts_per_container = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name,
    @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS restarts = SUM(restarts_per_container)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, restarts
| SORT @timestamp ASC, restarts DESC, k8s.namespace.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp

embeddableConfig.description:
Container restarts per namespace.

Shows the 10 namespaces with the most restarts.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 namespaces by container restarts

query.esql:
TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.name != ""
| STATS max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name,
     k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_restarts = SUM(max_restarts)
  BY timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| WHERE total_restarts > 0
| SORT timestamp ASC, total_restarts DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, total_restarts

  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL

  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name,

query.esql:
TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.daemonset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND (k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL
    OR k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL
    OR k8s.daemonset.ready_nodes IS NOT NULL)
| STATS
    current_scheduled = MAX(k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes),
    desired_scheduled = MAX(k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes),
    ready = MAX(k8s.daemonset.ready_nodes)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
    k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.daemonset.name
| STATS
    `Desired scheduled` = SUM(desired_scheduled),
    `Current scheduled` = SUM(current_scheduled),
    Ready = SUM(ready)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Desired scheduled`, `Current scheduled`, Ready

TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.daemonset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND (k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL
    OR k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL
    OR k8s.daemonset.ready_nodes IS NOT NULL)
| STATS
    current_scheduled = MAX(k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes),
    desired_scheduled = MAX(k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes),
    ready = MAX(k8s.daemonset.ready_nodes)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
    k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.daemonset.name
| STATS
    `Desired scheduled` = SUM(desired_scheduled),
    `Current scheduled` = SUM(current_scheduled),
    Ready = SUM(ready)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Desired scheduled`, `Current scheduled`, Ready

embeddableConfig.description: Total DaemonSet desired, current scheduled, and ready node counts over time, summed across all clusters and DaemonSets.
embeddableConfig.title: DaemonSet scheduling over time

query.esql:
TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND (k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL OR k8s.deployment.desired IS NOT NULL)
| STATS
    available = MAX(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired = MAX(k8s.deployment.desired)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
    k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| STATS
    Available = SUM(available),
    Desired = SUM(desired)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, Available, Desired

TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL

| STATS
    available = MAX(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired = MAX(k8s.deployment.desired)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),

| STATS
    Available = SUM(available),
    Desired = SUM(desired)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    cpu_usage = MAX(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    k8s.deployment.name = MAX(k8s.deployment.name)
  BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name
| WHERE cpu_usage > 0
| SORT @timestamp ASC, cpu_usage DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp
| KEEP @timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.name, cpu_usage

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    cpu_usage = MAX(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    k8s.deployment.name = MAX(k8s.deployment.name)
  BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name
| WHERE cpu_usage > 0
| SORT @timestamp ASC, cpu_usage DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp
| KEEP @timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.name, cpu_usage

embeddableConfig.description: Peak CPU usage per pod over time, across all clusters. Each time bucket shows the top 10 pods by maximum CPU usage (cores). Legend labels use cluster/namespace/pod.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 pods by max CPU usage

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    phase = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  AND phase == 2
| STATS running_count = COUNT(*)
| KEEP running_count

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    phase = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  AND phase == 2
| STATS running_count = COUNT(*)
| KEEP running_count

embeddableConfig.description: Number of pods in Running phase across all clusters, using the latest phase per pod and only pods scraped within 5 minutes of the freshest fleet scrape.

        last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| EVAL phase_label = CASE(
    phase == 1, "Pending",
    phase == 2, "Running",
    phase == 3, "Succeeded",
    phase == 4, "Failed",
    phase == 5, "Unknown",
    "Unknown")
| STATS pod_count = COUNT(*) BY phase_label
| SORT phase_label ASC

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp),
        last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| EVAL phase_label = CASE(
    phase == 1, "Pending",
    phase == 2, "Running",
    phase == 3, "Succeeded",
    phase == 4, "Failed",
    phase == 5, "Unknown",
    "Unknown")
| STATS pod_count = COUNT(*) BY phase_label
| SORT phase_label ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Distribution of pods by lifecycle phase across all clusters. Uses the latest phase per pod and only pods scraped within 5 minutes of the freshest fleet scrape.
embeddableConfig.title: Pods by phases

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name != ""
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name != ""
  AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    restarts_per_container = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    k8s.deployment.name = MAX(k8s.deployment.name)
  BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name,
     k8s.container.name
| STATS
    restarts = SUM(restarts_per_container),
    k8s.deployment.name = MAX(k8s.deployment.name)
  BY @timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name
| WHERE restarts > 0
| SORT @timestamp ASC, restarts DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp
| KEEP @timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.name, restarts

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name != ""
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name != ""
  AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    restarts_per_container = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    k8s.deployment.name = MAX(k8s.deployment.name)
  BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name,
     k8s.container.name
| STATS
    restarts = SUM(restarts_per_container),
    k8s.deployment.name = MAX(k8s.deployment.name)
  BY @timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name
| WHERE restarts > 0
| SORT @timestamp ASC, restarts DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp
| KEEP @timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.name, restarts

embeddableConfig.description: Container restarts per pod over time, across all clusters. Each time bucket shows the top 10 pods by total container restarts (summed per container, then per pod). Legend labels use cluster/namespace/pod.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 pods by container restarts
